1048.2:
[Liadrin] The Light guides my steps
and illuminates my path.
1048.3:
The Light flows through me, | and by its grace
I am made one with all that is sacred.
1048.4:
The Light guides my steps
and illuminates my path.
1048.5:
The Light flows through me, | and by its grace
I am made one with all that is sacred.
1048.6:
The Light guides my steps
and illuminates my path.
1048.7:
The Light flows through me, | and by its grace
I am made one with all that is sacred.
1048.17:
Our friends inside
can't maintain this ritual indefinitely.
1048.18: Have faith, Arator. | This is the light of our salvation.

1049.5: Hang on, my love. | I'm here.
1049.9: But you're far too late to save anyone.
1049.12: [Xal'atath] And now, | the moment of truth.
1049.13: I'll die before I serve you.
1049.18: ...it was never actually you | that I required.

1050.4: You Windrunners, | you just don't know | when to lay down and die.
1050.12: I honestly didn't factor for you.
1050.17: We'll finish this another time, perhaps.
1050.29:
[scoffs] I thought you said
you could never leave the Maw.
1050.30: There are ways, nephew. | But... | they do take their toll.
1050.31: Regardless, | you told me that Silvermoon was in peril.
1050.32: That it needed its ranger-general | one last time.
1050.33: Sylvanas, | if the Maw cannot hold you, | then maybe there's a way back for you.
1050.34: Back to us. | My penance, | my true work has only begun, | little sister.
1050.35:
The Shadowlands are not at all
what they seem.
1050.37:
I cannot rest
until I've uncovered the truth.
1050.38: Still, I hope to see you both again | before the end begins.
